description: Get dressed in these sandals from catwalk for a casual look. The interwoven elasticated bands lends a dose of chic style to your appearance, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Elasticated straps and leather heel cup for comfort and durability Asymmetric elasticated band on the forefoot with a leather backing Elastic bands criss-crossed over the midfoot to extend to the leather heel cup for a casual look and to secure the foot Midsole Cushioned synthetic leather covered footbed for added style and durability Outsole TPU outsole with textured surface for added grip Heel created by a collection of square lugs for better grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
